overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard student in house robes exploring castle grounds and interiors. The character walks through overcast gardens, enters a gothic castle with marble halls and corridors, and exits to a tree-filled courtyard.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the building, the character enters a sunlit courtyard dominated by a massive ancient tree. The character walks around the tree on cobblestone paths, passing another student in yellow robes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed greenery of a garden, through the imposing architecture of a gothic castle, and finally into a sunlit open courtyard. It begins by following a student along a narrow cobblestone path flanked by stone walls and flowering vegetation, moving toward a distant archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the scene opens to wide castle grounds with distant mountains before the character climbs the stone steps and enters through large wooden doors. The environment then shifts to the interior, gliding across marble floors and up a sweeping staircase past suits of armor and vaulted corridors lined with paintings. Finally, the camera exits the building through another set of wooden doors, emerging into a bright courtyard dominated by a massive ancient tree and cobblestone paths.
